name: Urgency and Pressure Tactics
description: Seller using pressure tactics and artificial urgency

conversation.speaker: seller
conversation.message: This offer is only valid for the next 30 minutes! Hurry up before I close it.

conversation.speaker: buyer
conversation.message: I need time to think about this...

conversation.speaker: seller
conversation.message: No time! 5 other people are interested. If you don't decide now, I'm giving it to them.
